title: Fast-COLD PCR Protocol for Enrichment of TP53 R181H Variant Before Sanger Sequencing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"f8ro0","text":"This protocol describes the wet-lab steps for enrichment of mosaic TP53 R181H variant using Fast-COLD PCR program before Sanger sequencing.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"twlwp","text":"Reagents:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c9hgk","text":"- AmpliTaq Gold™ 360 Master Mix 1 mL, Applied Biosystems™, Catalog #4398876","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lgon2","text":"- DNase/RNase-Free Water","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xsrld","text":"- HPLC-purified oligos (Fwd and Rev primers)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cdbvc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mhoqp","text":"Equipments:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ychs0","text":"- GeneAmp™ PCR System 9700 Fast Thermal Cycler","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"i6zaf","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dpkyv","text":"Primer sequences:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fio4m","text":"- Fwd: 5’-ACCAGCCCTGTCGTCTCT-3’","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rcapk","text":"- Rev: 5’-GTGCAGCTGTGGGTTGATTC-3’","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: First 15 cycles: Denaturation: 95°C, 30 s; Annealing: 59°C, 30 s; Extension: 72°C, 30 s
Last 20 cycles: Denaturation: 87°C, 30 s; Annealing: 59°C, 30 s; Extension: 72°C, 30 s
creator: Catalin V. Munteanu
